rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §43.057 governs liability insurance for board members and employees of a corporation. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 43.057. LIABILITY INSURANCE FOR BOARD MEMBERS AND EMPLOYEES.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
